summary: All Issue #730 acceptance criteria verified. Tooltip component (TOOLTIP_DELAY_MS=100, role=tooltip + aria-hidden=true, wrapper span tabIndex=-1, useEffect cleanup, no React.cloneElement = ref/event transparent) implemented correctly. TerminalContainer exports HISTORY_PANE_ID='worktree-history-pane', wraps History/Terminal in ErrorBoundary, owns useHistoryPaneState. ActivityBar's native title attribute completely removed; each button wrapped in Tooltip while preserving aria-label/aria-controls/buttonRefs and ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End keyboard navigation. WorktreeDesktopLayout simplified to 2-column (activityPane + rightPane) — removed activityBar/historyPane/historyPaneCollapsed/onToggleHistoryPane/onHistoryPaneResize/historyPaneWidth props, MobileLayout fallback, useIsMobile import, and HISTORY_PANE_ID. WorktreeDetailRefactored restructured: ActivityBar lives outside WorktreeDesktopLayout as a full-height column; TerminalContainer is passed as rightPane with historyPaneMemo/rightPaneMemo. useHistoryPaneState DEFAULT_HISTORY_WIDTH raised 25→40 with a CustomEvent broadcaster ('commandmate:historyPaneStateChange') to keep the two hook consumers in sync (justified implementation decision; covered by existing tests). Quality gate reproduced: lint OK, tsc OK, unit 6628/0/7 (352 files), build OK. Integration suite 544 pass / 39 fail — all 39 pre-existing and out-of-scope per TDD verification.

ActivityBar.tsx renders ACTIVITIES.map without overflow-y / max-height; w-12/h-12 per icon * 6 = 288px well under realistic viewport; full-height column eliminates the prior Schedules-cutoff issue noted in Issue body

details.criterion: lint / tsc / test:unit / build all PASS
details.verified: Re-run on this verification: npm run lint -> 'No ESLint warnings or errors'; npx tsc --noEmit -> no output (success); npm run test:unit -> 352 files / 6628 passed / 7 skipped / 0 failed; npm run build -> completed with route table printed

Affected suites (Tooltip 13, TerminalContainer 11, ActivityBar 16, WorktreeDesktopLayout 10, WorktreeDetailRefactored 41, HistoryPane suite, cli-tab-switching 2, issue-266-acceptance 7, useHistoryPaneState 7, mobile-overflow) all PASS; integration 39 pre-existing failures confirmed unrelated (api-clone/api-hooks/tmux/trust-dialog/Claude session)

test_unit.notes: Numbers are within 2 tests of TDD report (6626) - likely due to dynamic skip flags. Zero failures confirmed.

test_integration.notes: All 39 failures are pre-existing and confirmed out-of-scope (api-clone / api-hooks / api-kill-session / api-messages / api-prompt-handling / api-respond / api-worktrees / current-output / trust-dialog / Claude session integration). Verified in TDD step by stashing #730 changes.

Docs (CLAUDE.md/UI_UX_GUIDE.md/CHANGELOG.md) are scheduled for Phase 4, not part of TDD commit. Out of acceptance scope here.

grep on WorktreeDesktopLayout.tsx returns zero useIsMobile / MobileLayout / historyPane / activityBar / onToggleHistoryPane / onHistoryPaneResize references. Lines now 145 (down from 437 in prior version).

verification_targets_status.target: title attribute fully removed from ActivityBar.tsx
verification_targets_status.note: grep 'title=' returns nothing; ActivityBar.test L131-139 explicit assertion present

useHistoryPaneState.ts L99-127 introduces HISTORY_PANE_STATE_EVENT='commandmate:historyPaneStateChange'. Rationale: WorktreeDetailRefactored uses useHistoryPaneState only for the toggle handle passed into historyPaneMemo (onCollapse wiring), and TerminalContainer calls useHistoryPaneState again for the actual render. Same-window localStorage writes do not fire native 'storage' events, so without this CustomEvent the two hook instances would desync after the first toggle. The implementation is window.dispatchEvent + addEventListener with try/catch around CustomEvent ctor for legacy compatibility, and existing useHistoryPaneState.test.ts (7 tests) still passes. Considered acceptable; recommend a one-line module-reference comment in CLAUDE.md when Phase 4 docs land.

issues_found.title: Two extra test counts vs TDD report (6628 vs 6626)
issues_found.description: When rerunning unit tests during verification, the suite reports 6628 passed instead of the TDD-reported 6626. Both still show 0 failures and 7 skipped. The +2 delta likely reflects conditionally-included tests that depend on test execution order or environment timing. Not a regression; both runs reach the same pass/fail outcome.

issues_found.title: useHistoryPaneState CustomEvent broadcaster is an undocumented implementation detail
issues_found.description: The new HISTORY_PANE_STATE_EVENT ('commandmate:historyPaneStateChange') broadcaster is necessary because two hook consumers (WorktreeDetailRefactored for onCollapse and TerminalContainer for render) coexist on the same window and same-window localStorage writes don't fire 'storage' events. The implementation is correct and covered by existing tests, but the rationale is not yet captured in CLAUDE.md / UI_UX_GUIDE.md.
issues_found.suggested_fix: When Phase 4 documentation lands (CLAUDE.md updates per work plan), add a one-line note next to useHistoryPaneState.ts: 'Broadcasts CustomEvent to keep multiple hook instances in sync (Issue #730)'.

overall_judgment: passed — all 28 acceptance criteria across the 4 categories (Tooltip / ActivityBar full-height / History inclusion / cross-cutting) are met. Code review confirms intent (title attribute fully removed, HISTORY_PANE_ID re-exported from TerminalContainer, ErrorBoundary wraps both halves, DEFAULT_HISTORY_WIDTH=40, MobileLayout dead code purged from WorktreeDesktopLayout). New tests (Tooltip 13 + TerminalContainer 11) and updated tests (ActivityBar 16, WorktreeDesktopLayout 10, WorktreeDetailRefactored 41, issue-266 7, cli-tab-switching 2, HistoryPane unchanged, useHistoryPaneState 7) all PASS. Quality gate fully reproduced: lint clean, tsc clean, unit 6628/0/7, build OK. Integration 39 pre-existing failures verified out-of-scope per TDD report. Two minor advisory notes recorded (test-count delta, CustomEvent rationale documentation) — neither blocks acceptance.
next_action: Proceed to Phase 4 (docs: CLAUDE.md / docs/UI_UX_GUIDE.md / CHANGELOG.md updates) and Phase 5 (PR creation). Recommend including a one-line note in CLAUDE.md's useHistoryPaneState row about the new CustomEvent broadcaster for traceability.
